mustHaves.summary: Operator signs in + connects company Stripe; failed-charge events flow in
On failed charge, send reminder email (Postmark) + SMS (Twilio) with update link
On later successful charge, stop the sequence + mark resolved

notes: external-integrations REQUIRED with three named third-party services (Stripe, Twilio, Postmark), each needing its own shape (auth, data flow, failure mode) + a webhook-receiver surface. secrets required: three sets of API credentials. error-handling required and DEEP: every must-have crosses an external dependency (partial-failure, retry, provider-down). abuse-surface required: the Stripe webhook receiver + the public update link are unauthenticated surfaces (signature verification + link-token validation). authz excluded: a single operator role, no cross-operator data boundary in v1 (recipients are not account holders). observability required: production multi-integration operation. perf-envelope excluded: §8 names no latency/throughput number.
